chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. Nos. D-470 and 471 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of CMA No.2520/25 3.For hg of main case 14.02.2025. Mr. Khalid Javed Khan, advocate for petitioners. Syed Shah Hussain, Assistant Advocate General along with Zulfiqar Khusk, Director General, Rashid Ansari, Deputy Director, Mines and Minerals Development and Syed Sahib Bokkozie, Senior Law Officer. Learned counsel for respondents has set out a proposal for a consideration that since appeals of the petitioners under section 48 of Sindh Mines and Minerals Governance Act, 2021 are pending against the impugned notification before respondent No. 1, they will be decided within a period of thirty days and till that period no third party interest will be created over the subject matter. This proposal has been accepted by the other side with a request that any decision on appeals may not be effective for ten days enabling the petitioners to avail a legal remedy against it in case it is adverse. These petitions are, therefore, on such undertaking supported by Zulfiqar Khusk, Director General, Rashid Ansari, Deputy Director, Mines and Minerals Development and Syed Sahib Bokkozie, Senior Law Officer are disposed of in above terms. Let these appeals be decided within thirty days maximum by a decision to be effective on expiry of ten days on availing of remedy by the appellants pending before the proper forum, whichever is earlier. These petitions are accordingly disposed of in above terms along with listed application.

Let these appeals be decided within thirty days maximum by a decision to be effective on expiry of ten days on availing of remedy by the appellants pending before the proper forum, whichever is earlier. These petitions are accordingly disposed of in above terms along with listed application. JUDGE hanif
